mapper.insert: INSERT INTO neighbor_support_task_admin (requester_user_id, assignee_user_id, title, category_code, description, location_text, latitude, longitude, start_time, end_time, volunteer_slots, filled_slots, priority, reward_points, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{requesterUserId}, #{assigneeUserId}, #{title}, #{categoryCode}, #{description}, #{locationText}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{volunteerSlots}, #{filledSlots}, #{priority}, #{rewardPoints}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
